question: Who does she want present in the delivery room?
placeholder: e.g., Just us, her mom, a doula...

question: Does she want to be offered pain medication? If so, what type?
placeholder: e.g., Open to epidural after 6cm, laughing gas first, IV narcotics okay...
description:
Pain medication options during labor. Here are common choices:

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
EPIDURAL
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
When: After 4-6cm dilation
How: Catheter in lower back numbs lower body. You stay awake.
Why: Most effective pain relief. Allows rest during long labor.
Trade-offs: Limits movement. Requires IV & monitoring. Rare headache risk after.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
NARCOTICS (IV)
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
When: Early-to-mid labor
How: Injectable opioids. Takes 15-20 minutes to work.
Why: Takes edge off pain. Allows some sleep.
Trade-offs: Makes you drowsy. Can affect baby's breathing if given close to birth. Less reliable than epidural.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
LAUGHING GAS (Nitrous Oxide)
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
When: Throughout labor
How: Self-administered mask. Inhale during contractions, release between.
Why: You stay in control. Fast mild relief. No side effects on baby.
Trade-offs: Provides mild relief only. Must use consistently. Some people feel nausea.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
NO MEDICATION
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
When: Throughout labor
How: Movement, breathing, water, massage, doula support, position changes.
Why: Maintains full control & mobility. Very effective with continuous support.
Trade-offs: More intense experience. Requires dedicated partner/support. Less predictable relief.

question: Does she want to try a natural birth with alternative comfort measures?
Does she want to move freely during labor?
Does she want to use hydrotherapy (tub/shower)?
Does she want the baby continuously monitored?
Does she want delayed cord clamping?
Any special requests for a C-section if needed?
placeholder: e.g., Delayed cord clamping, skin to skin, dad holds baby...
